creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Gerrit Beine <gerrit.beine@gmx.de> -----

Thanks for the patch.
The version difference of MediaWiki is known.
Miwi an me discussed that at LinuxTag in Berlin and decided how to go on
with the port.
But I am at the moment in Kyrgyzstan with a 2kpbs internet connection.
That makes it really hard to do something on my Tinderbox.
Expect the update of MediaWiki in the week of 22nd of July.

So long...

Gerrit

----- End forwarded message -----
